===================
===================
===================
=== Dylan_Boulder_April_18_2001.txt
===================
===================
===================
- - -
LB-1073
- - -

Boulder, Colorado
University Of Colorado
Coors Events Center
April 18, 2001

Disc 1:
1. Roving Gambler (acoustic)
2. To Ramona (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin)
3. Desolation Row (acoustic)
4. To Be Alone With You (Larry on Fiddle)
5. Tears Of Rage (Bob on harp)
6. Things Have Changed
7. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic)
8. Masters Of War (acoustic)
9. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
10. Standing In The Doorway
11. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp)

Disc 2:
1. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
(1st encore)
2. Love Sick
3. Like A Rolling Stone
4. If Dogs Run Free (acoustic) (Larry and Charlie on electric guitars)
5. All Along The Watchtower (Larry on steel guitar)
6. Girl Of The North Country (acoustic)
7. Highway 61 Revisited
8. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic)
(2nd encore)
9. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry on steel guitar)

- - -

Audio CDR to aif (iTunes v8.0.2 for Mac OS X) to flac (xACT v2.05 for Mac OS X)

- - -
